Opened in 1992, it was the first roller coaster manufactured by Custom Coasters International, Inc.. It was the first roller coaster designed by Mike Boodley, who later co-founded Great Coasters International.

fullText:
Kingdom Coaster (formerly known as Sky Princess until 2006) is a wooden roller coaster located at Dutch Wonderland in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, USA. Opened in 1992, it was the first roller coaster manufactured by Custom Coasters International, Inc.. It was the first roller coaster designed by Mike Boodley, who later co-founded Great Coasters International.

Approximately of Titan Track from Great Coasters International and Skyline Attractions was added to the start of the ride in 2025.



The train was built by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters, Inc.
